description:
Stage-7 (Assessment Sent) entry handler. When an applicant enters Stage
7, generates per-candidate token URLs for the job's three assessments
and emails a single bundle. Skips any assessment the candidate already
completed in a prior application (matched by email_from).

Three assessments per job: Technical (native hr.job.survey_id), Logical
(hr.job.x_studio_logical_assessment), Emotional
(hr.job.x_studio_emotional_assessment). Latter two are custom Studio
fields that already exist on every target env.

Ships the Triple Assessment Bundle template, the dispatch SA, the
stage-write automation, and the recruiter "Resend Assessment Bundle"
button on the hr.applicant Action menu.

model_id=662 (hr.applicant ir.model).
